name: Number 105: Battlin' Boxer Star Cestus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０５ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のセスタス
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Hyakugo Bāningu Nakkurā Ryūsei no Sesutasu
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
Once per Chain, during the Battle Step, if your "Battlin' Boxer" monster battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the effects of that opponent's monster while it is face-up until the end of this turn, that monster you control cannot be destroyed by that battle, also your opponent takes any battle damage you would have taken from that battle.

eff:
3 Level 4 monsters

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
